trait.name: Blind Obedience
trait.description: Can carry multiple random-move-type moves (including Borrow, Rewrite, and Mind Grab), non-Illusion-type moves have move energy cost -2.

zh.name: 盲从
zh.description: 可以携带多个随机技能类技能（包括借用，复写，取念），非幻系技能能耗-2。

move_pool.name: Supernova Gift

zh.name: 超新星馈赠
zh.description: 敌方获得2层星陨，每使用1次，赋予的星陨层数+1。

move_pool.description: Opponent gains 2 stacks of Starfall Mark. Each time this move is used, the number of stacks it grants increases by 1.

move_pool.name: Imitation

zh.name: 偷师
zh.description: 造成物伤，自己回复1能量。

move_pool.description: Deals physical damage. User restores 1 energy.

move_pool.name: Slap

zh.name: 拍击
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成魔法伤害。

move_pool.description: Deals magic damage to the opponent.

move_pool.name: Floral Scent

zh.name: 花香
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成魔法伤害。

move_pool.description: Deals magic damage to the opponent.

move_pool.name: Defend

zh.name: 防御
zh.description: 减伤70%，应对攻击。

move_pool.description: Damage taken -70%. Counter Attack.

move_pool.name: Mind Grab

zh.name: 取念
zh.description: 每回合随机变成敌方任意精灵的技能，且该技能能耗-2。

move_pool.description: Each turn, this move becomes a random move from any of the opponent's monsters, and its energy cost -2.

move_pool.name: Bottom-Out Blow

zh.name: 触底强击
zh.description: 造成魔伤，释放后若能量耗尽，本次攻击威力+100。

move_pool.description: Deals magic damage. If energy is depleted after use, power +100 for this attack.

move_pool.name: Rewrite

zh.name: 复写
zh.description: 每回合随机变成自己未携带的技能，且该技能能耗-2。

move_pool.description: Each turn, this move becomes a random uncarried move from this monster, and its energy cost -2.

move_pool.name: Disinfection

zh.name: 消毒法
zh.description: 造成魔伤，驱散敌方5层增益。

move_pool.description: Deals magic damage and dispels 5 stacks of Buffs from the opponent.

move_pool.name: Momentum Blow

zh.name: 气势一击
zh.description: 造成物伤，若上回合应对成功，本次技能威力+240。

move_pool.description: Deals physical damage. If a successful Counter was performed last turn, this move's power +240.

move_pool.name: Quick Move

zh.name: 快速移动
zh.description: 自己获得速度+70，应对防御：改为速度+140。

move_pool.description: User's Speed +70. Counter Defense: User's Speed +140 instead.

move_pool.name: Abundance

zh.name: 丰饶
zh.description: 自己获得物攻和魔攻+130%。

move_pool.description: User gains Attack +130%.

move_pool.name: Control

zh.name: 操控
zh.description: 敌方本回合使用的技能能耗+6。

move_pool.description: Opponent gains move energy cost +6 this turn.

move_pool.name: Attack Field

zh.name: 主场优势
zh.description: 自己获得1层攻击印记。

move_pool.description: Gains 1 stack of Attack Mark.

move_pool.name: Borrow

zh.name: 借用
zh.description: 每回合随机变成己方队伍中其他精灵的技能。

move_pool.description: At the start of each turn, this move becomes a random move carried by a teammate.

move_pool.name: Magic Boost

zh.name: 魔法增效
zh.description: 自己获得魔攻+70%。

move_pool.description: User's Magic Attack +70%.

move_pool.name: Wishing Star

zh.name: 许愿星
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成魔法伤害。

move_pool.description: Deals magic damage to the opponent.

move_pool.name: Collapse

zh.name: 坍缩
zh.description: 造成魔伤，若击败敌方，自己获得魔攻+50%。

move_pool.description: Deals magic damage. If this move defeats the opponent, user gains Magic Attack +50%.

move_pool.name: Antinomy

zh.name: 二律背反
zh.description: 敌方获得3层星陨，应对防御：额外使敌方星陨层数翻倍。

move_pool.description: Opponent gains 3 stacks of Starfall Mark. Counter Defense: additionally doubles the opponent's Starfall Mark stacks.

move_pool.name: Big Bang

zh.name: 大爆炸
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成魔法伤害。

move_pool.description: Deals magic damage to the opponent.

move_stones.name: Flying Kick

zh.name: 飞踢
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成物理伤害。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent.

move_stones.name: Tail Sweep

zh.name: 扫尾
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成物理伤害。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent

move_stones.name: Energy Blade

zh.name: 能量刃
zh.description: 造成物伤，每应对成功1次，本技能威力永久+90。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. Each time this monster performs a successful Counter, this move's power +90 permanently.

move_stones.name: Blunt Blow

zh.name: 当头棒喝
zh.description: 造成物伤，若敌方本回合替换精灵，本次技能威力+150。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. If the opponent switches monsters this turn, this move's power +150.

move_stones.name: Reversal

zh.name: 后发制人
zh.description: 造成物理伤害，先手-1。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. Priority -1.

move_stones.name: Preemptive Strike

zh.description: 造成物理伤害，先手+1。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. Priority +1.

move_stones.name: Energy Cannon

zh.name: 能量炮
zh.description: 造成魔伤，2连击。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage. 2 Combo.

move_stones.name: Press the Advantage

zh.name: 乘胜追击
zh.description: 造成物伤，1连击，每次使用后，本技能连击数永久+1。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. 1 Combo. Each time this move is used, this move's Combo count +1 permanently.

move_stones.name: Reversal Strike

zh.name: 逆袭
zh.description: 造成物伤，本技能能耗每+1，威力+45。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. Each time this move's energy cost increases by 1, its power +45.

move_stones.name: Heavy Blow

zh.name: 重击
zh.description: 造成物伤，每次使用后，本技能能耗永久+1。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. Each time this move is used, its energy cost +1 permanently.

move_stones.name: Mana Burst

zh.name: 魔能爆
zh.description: 造成魔伤，释放时消耗所有能量，消耗越多，伤害越高。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage. Consumes all energy when used. The more energy consumed, the higher the damage.

move_stones.name: Desperate Counterattack

zh.name: 垂死反击
zh.description: 造成物伤，自己每失去5%生命，本次技能威力+5。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. For every 5% HP lost by the user, move power +5 for this attack.

move_stones.name: Opportunistic Strike

zh.name: 伺机而动
zh.description: 下一次行动时，攻击技能威力+70。

move_stones.description: On the next action, Attack-type move power +70.

move_stones.name: Stress Response

zh.name: 应激反应
zh.description: 自己回复25%生命，应对防御：改为回复50%生命。

move_stones.description: User restores 25% HP. Counter Defense: user restores 50% HP instead.

move_stones.name: Prevention Protocol

zh.name: 有效预防
zh.description: 减伤50%，应对攻击：下一次行动获得先手+1。

move_stones.description: Damage taken -50%. Counter Attack: next turn, user gains Priority +1.

move_stones.name: Warm-Up Drill

zh.name: 热身运动
zh.description: 自己获得连击数+3。

move_stones.description: Gains Combo count +3.

move_stones.name: Spinning Charge

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. 3 Combo.

zh.description: 自己获得魔防+150%。

move_stones.description: User's Magic Defense +150%.

zh.name: 耀眼

move_stones.description: Opponent gains Combo count -4.

move_stones.name: Triple Break

zh.name: 三连破
zh.description: 自己获得物攻+30%，3连击。

move_stones.description: User's Physical Attack +30%. 3 Combo.

zh.description: 驱散敌方所有增益。

move_stones.description: Dispels all Buffs from the opponent.

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent.

zh.name: 刺藤
zh.description: 造成物伤，2连击。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. 2 Combo.

zh.name: 藤绞
zh.description: 造成物伤，自己回复5能量。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. User restores 5 energy.

move_stones.name: Bloom

zh.name: 盛开
zh.description: 自己获得全技能威力+30，应对防御：改为全技能威力+70。

move_stones.description: User gains Move Power +30. Counter Defense: gains Move Power +70 instead.

move_stones.name: Root Absorption

zh.name: 根吸收
zh.description: 自己回复15%生命和4能量。

move_stones.description: User restores 15% HP and 4 energy.

zh.name: 花炮
zh.description: 2连击，每次连击自己获得魔攻+50%。

move_stones.description: 2 Combo. For each hit, user's Magic Attack +50%.

zh.name: 酶浓度调整
zh.description: 减伤70%，应对攻击：自己回复20%生命。

move_stones.description: Damage taken -70%. Counter Attack: restores 25% HP.

zh.name: 纤维化
zh.description: 减伤70%，应对攻击：自己获得物防+40%。

move_stones.description: Damage taken -70%. Counter Attack: user gains Physical Defense +40%.

zh.description: 赋予敌方1层寄生效果。

move_stones.description: Applies 1 stack of Leech to the opponent.

move_stones.name: Aromatic Lure

zh.name: 芳香诱引
zh.description: 自己获得连击数+3，应对防御：额外造成打断，且敌方下回合获得眩晕。

move_stones.description: User gains Combo count +3. Counter Defense: additionally triggers Interrupt, and opponent gains Stun next turn.

move_stones.name: Seed Coat Burst

zh.name: 种皮爆裂
zh.description: 造成物伤，2连击。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. 2 Combo.

move_stones.name: Phloem Surge

zh.name: 筛管奔流
zh.description: 造成物伤，自己生命大于80%时，本次技能威力+75。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. If user's HP is greater than 80%, this move's power +75.

zh.name: 聚盐
zh.description: 2连击，每次连击自己回复5%生命和1能量，使用后本技能连击数永久+1。

move_stones.description: 2 Combo. For each hit, user restores 5% HP and 1 energy. After use, this move's Combo count +1 permanently.

move_stones.name: Electric Arc

zh.name: 电弧
zh.description: 造成物伤，迸发：本次技能威力+40。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. Burst: this move's power +40.

zh.name: 超导
zh.description: 造成魔伤，迸发：本技能能耗-1。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage. Burst: this move's energy cost -1.

move_stones.name: Electromagnetic Deflection

zh.name: 电磁偏转
zh.description: 减伤60%，应对攻击：下回合所选技能使用次数+1。

move_stones.description: Damage taken -60%. Counter Attack: on the next turn, the move selected by the user will be performed one additional time.

move_stones.name: Overload Circuit

zh.name: 过载回路
zh.description: 自己返场，下回合所选技能使用次数+1。

move_stones.description: User triggers Re-Enter. On the next turn, user's selected move will be performed one additional time.

move_stones.name: Ion Explosion

zh.name: 电离爆破
zh.description: 敌方获得速度-40，3连击。

move_stones.description: Opponent gains Speed -40, 3 Combo.

move_stones.name: Spatial Pressure

zh.name: 空间压迫

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. Opponent gains 1 stack of Starfall Mark.

move_stones.name: Star Chain

zh.name: 星链
zh.description: 2连击，每次连击使敌方获得1层星陨。

move_stones.description: 2 Combo, each hit gives opponent 1 stack of Starfall Mark.

move_stones.name: Stellar Fission

zh.name: 星轨裂变
zh.description: 敌方获得2层星陨。

move_stones.description: Opponent gains 2 stacks of Starfall Mark.

move_stones.name: Psychic Insight

zh.name: 心灵洞悉
zh.description: 敌方获得星陨，获得层数等于敌方印记层数。

move_stones.description: Opponent gains Starfall Mark stacks equal to the number of Mark stacks on them.

move_stones.name: Multi-dimensional Strike

zh.name: 多维击打
zh.description: 造成魔伤，1连击，敌方每有1层星陨，本次技能连击数+1。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage, 1 Combo. For each Starfall Mark stack on the opponent, this move's Combo count +1.

world_profile.introduction: 总是一副亲切愉悦的样子，备受小洛克们的喜欢，但似乎在没人的时候它们不会展现出一丁点生气。曾经不分昼夜持续观测一年，且让样本知道自己被观测，期间样本呈现愉悦的状态。停止观测一小时后样本所有生命体征均消失。
